body:
## Problem / Opportunity

GSC data (2026-06-18): **"joey jordison drum set" — 118 impressions, 0.85% CTR, pos 9.0** — the site's highest-impression content-gap query. #1261 deepens his *profile page*. This proposal creates a **dedicated article at `/articles/joey-jordison-drum-setup`** — a second ranking URL targeting the same query cluster, same strategy that shipped for Matt Greiner (#1267 → #1313, pos 7.0 / 20% CTR).

## New content: `/articles/joey-jordison-drum-setup`

**File to create/update:** `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add new entry

```js
'joey-jordison-drum-setup': {
  title: "Joey Jordison Drum Setup: The Complete Slipknot Gear Breakdown",
  albumTitle: "Joey Jordison",
  description: "What drum kit did Joey Jordison use with Slipknot? Complete gear breakdown: Pearl kits, Sabian cymbals, DW pedals, and the rig that defined nu-metal drumming.",
  drummer: { name: 'Joey Jordison', id: 2, slug: 'joey-jordison' },
  relatedDrummers: [2],
  datePublished: '2026-06-18',
  dateModified: '2026-06-18',
  keywords: ['joey jordison', 'joey jordison drum set', 'joey jordison drum kit', 'slipknot drummer gear', 'joey jordison setup'],
  author: 'MetalForge Editorial',
  // ... full article content fields
}
```

## Content requirements (quality gate)
- **≥800 words** covering:
  1. Slipknot era kit (Pearl Masterworks / Reference kit in black/orange, specific shell sizes)
  2. Cymbal setup (Sabian — specific models used on Iowa and Vol. 3)
  3. Pedal setup (DW 9000 double pedal, later Pearl Eliminator)
  4. Stick choice (Vic Firth or LA Special)
  5. Jordison's playing philosophy and what made his setup unique for nu-metal
- **FAQ section** (≥3 Q&As targeting the query cluster):
  - "What drum kit did Joey Jordison use with Slipknot?"
  - "What cymbals did Joey Jordison play?"
  - "What double bass pedals did Joey Jordison use?"
- **Internal links:** to /drummer/2 (Joey's profile), at least 2 other drummer profiles (Lars Ulrich, Matt Greiner)
- **Article JSON-LD** schema with datePublished, author, keywords (via existing ALBUM_ARTICLES → SSR meta pipeline)

## SSR meta target
- **Title:** `Joey Jordison Drum Setup: Slipknot Drummer Kit & Gear Breakdown | MetalForge`
- **Description:** `What drum set did Joey Jordison use? Complete gear breakdown of his Pearl kit, Sabian cymbals, and DW pedals — the rig that defined Slipknot's sound.`

## GSC query bucket served
- "joey jordison drum set" (118 impr, 0.85% CTR, pos 9.0) — primary target
- "joey jordison drum kit" — variant
- "joey jordison drum setup" — variant
- "slipknot drummer kit" — adjacent

## Expected impact
Moving from pos 9 → pos 5-7 for 118 impr query = ~+10 clicks/wk conservatively. Compounds #1261 (profile depth) which already addresses the query from the profile side.

## Sequencing
Independent of other open issues. Can ship in parallel.

## Verify
1. `/articles/joey-jordison-drum-setup` returns 200
2. `curl -s https://metalforge.io/api/meta/articles/joey-jordison-drum-setup | grep title` contains "Joey Jordison" + "Drum Setup"
3. GSC Rich Results Test shows Article JSON-LD
4. Article word count ≥800
5. FAQ section present with ≥3 Q&As matching GSC query variants

## Done
- [ ] New entry in `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js`
- [ ] Article content (≥800 words, FAQ, internal links) populated
- [ ] SSR meta returns keyword-matched title/description
- [ ] Article JSON-LD present in SSR response
title: SEO: Joey Jordison complete drum setup article — second ranking URL for 118 impr 'joey jordison drum set' query
